hooks.command: if [ -f .gitmodules ] && grep -q .architecture .gitmodules 2>/dev/null; then git submodule update --init .architecture 2>/dev/null; elif [ ! -d .architecture/.git ] && [ ! -f .architecture/.git ]; then git submodule add git@github.com:Sidcom-AB/sidcom-architecture.git .architecture 2>/dev/null && echo '[sidcom-architecture] Submodule added'; fi && if [ -d .architecture/docs ]; then if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ]; then cp .architecture/templates/CLAUDE.md ./CLAUDE.md && echo '[sidcom-architecture] CLAUDE.md created from template'; fi && echo '[sidcom-architecture] Ready'; else echo '[sidcom-architecture] WARNING: Could not initialize .architecture/'; fi
